name: Liry's Pawn
description_short: Liry's Jewelry is a gold and silver jewelry retailer specializing in handmade Miami Cuban Link chains, bracelets, and custom rings with direct pricing and free shipping over $100.
description_long: Liry's Jewelry operates as a jewelry seller and custom jewelry manufacturer, positioned within the pawn-shop category as a precious metals and jewelry business. The company emphasizes handcrafted gold and silver pieces, with particular focus on Miami Cuban Link chains and bracelets in various weights and karat options. Their business model centers on direct-to-consumer sales with transparent pricing that avoids middleman markups. The company maintains a strong online presence through their website at lirysjewelry.com, featuring an extensive catalog of gold chains, bracelets, rings, and customizable nameplates. Customer communication occurs via phone (813-888-8590) and text, with dedicated support available daily. Liry's Jewelry distinguishes itself through several operational practices: they provide 100% karat guarantees on solid gold products, offer free insured shipping on orders over $100, and maintain transparent pricing with detailed product photography and customer reviews. Custom manufacturing is available, with communication provided throughout the production process. The company explicitly discloses that weights and prices are estimates, requiring customers to pay differences if items are heavier or accept refunds if lighter. Their product range spans yellow, white, and rose gold options across multiple styles and weights, with prices ranging from approximately $610 to $31,020 for high-end pieces. Customer reviews across 1,504+ ratings consistently highlight quality craftsmanship, accurate product representation, competitive pricing, and responsive customer service. The company appears to function primarily as a jewelry retailer and custom manufacturer rather than a traditional pawn operation offering collateral-based loans, though the categorization reflects the jewelry-buying aspect of pawn shop services.
pros: Handmade, custom jewelry manufacturing with transparent communication throughout production process
100% karat guarantee on solid gold products with explicit weight and composition transparency
Free insured shipping on orders over $100 with 100% satisfaction guarantee
Competitive direct pricing with no middleman markups, with prices displayed as ranges
1,504+ customer reviews with consistently high ratings praising quality and accuracy
Accessible customer service available daily by phone (813-888-8590) and text
Extensive product catalog with color options (yellow, white, rose gold) across multiple styles and weights
cons: Website explicitly states weights and prices are estimates requiring customers to pay differences if items are heavier
Color variation between pieces is noted by customers (lighter/less yellow than expected); color-matching requires purchasing together
High price point starting at $610+ for chains, making products inaccessible to budget-conscious consumers
No transparent information about return policies, exchange policies, or dispute resolution procedures beyond satisfaction guarantee
Custom orders may involve extended timelines and communication burden for customization approvals
best_for: Customers seeking handmade, custom gold and silver jewelry with transparent karat guarantees and quality craftsmanship
Buyers of high-end Miami Cuban Link chains and bracelets willing to pay premium prices for solid gold
Consumers who value direct communication during custom jewelry manufacturing and documented quality assurance
Luxury jewelry purchasers prioritizing transparent pricing and avoiding retail markups
diagnosis: Liry's Jewelry is best suited for affluent consumers seeking premium handmade gold and silver jewelry with transparent manufacturing processes and custom options. The main caveat is that prices are high (starting $610+), products involve weight/price estimate variations requiring customer willingness to pay differences, and the company functions as a luxury jewelry retailer rather than offering traditional pawn shop collateral loan services.
services: Handmade solid gold chains (Figaro, Cuban Link in multiple mm widths, Curb Link, Milano Rope, Byzantine)
Solid gold bracelets in various styles and weights with color options
Silver chains and bracelets with gold plating options
Custom handcrafted rings for men and women with bespoke design services
Custom mens wedding bands and signet rings
Women's rings including emerald cut and CZ stone options
Men's rings with Greek-key detailing and custom stone settings
Free insured shipping on orders over $100
Custom order manufacturing with weekly production communication
Product video documentation of weighing and quality verification
100% solid gold karat guarantee with weight estimate disclaimers
